title: Trade as a tool for war to counter the growing economic might of new Powers

title: Preventing the Emergence of a Multipolar World Order
exact_ocr_heading: • 2.5 Preventing the Emergence of a Multipolar World Order :
content_preview: China's economic expansion challenged US global dominance. Trump imposed tariffs to slow China's rise and prevent a shift toward a multipolar or bipolar world order.

title: Tariffs as a Strategic Deterrent by US to slow rising powers
exact_ocr_heading: Tariffs as a Strategic Deterrent by US to slow rising powers :
content_preview: Tariffs were imposed to slow the economic momentum of rising powers, particularly China, by making their exports less competitive in the US market. This realist strategy prevented rivals from gaining

title: Limiting China's Belt and Road Initiative BRI Influence
exact_ocr_heading: 2.9 Limiting China's Belt and Road Initiative BRI Influence :
content_preview: Tariffs and sanctions signaled to other countries that economically siding with China may carry risks, countering China's rise as a global power through the Belt and Road Initiative.

title: Conclusion
content_preview: The US reliance on tariffs and trade restrictions under Trump was aimed at maintaining strategic primacy and constraining the rise of competitors, particularly China.
